infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TourneyForge uses your location to GPS-tag your catch submissions.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: TourneyForge uses your location to GPS-tag your catch submissions.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TourneyForge needs camera access to photograph your catch.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TourneyForge needs photo library access to attach catch photos.
